notes:
vMLX 1.5.39

Highlights:
- Adds native MTP detection/status wiring for supported Qwen 3.6 text and VL artifacts.
- Defaults supported native-MTP artifacts to D3 while keeping model-local tuning sidecars opt-in.
- Keeps artifact-backed affine-JANG Qwen MTP+VL bundles on the multimodal app/session path when indexed MTP and vision tensors are present.
- Preserves bundle generation_config / jang_config sampling defaults as engine-owned request defaults.
- Includes source/PyPI runtime patch parity for Kimi K2.6 MLA and Gemma 4 vision pixel-value handling.

Verification:
- Python source sweep passed: 1108 passed, 45 skipped.
- Panel tests passed: 1811 tests; typecheck passed.
- Bundled Python verifier passed with vmlx_engine 1.5.39 and jang_tools 2.5.30.
- Mounted DMG runtime probe passed: native MTP default depth D3 and Qwen3.6-27B-JANG_4M-MTP reports native_runtime_ready text+vl.
- DMG signed, notarized, stapled, and accepted by Gatekeeper as Notarized Developer ID.
